3 FOUNDATION NOTE:      All protocol calls (KredioPASMarket, KredioLending) use msg.sender for      position/balance accounting. In the current Phase 3 design, the settler      itself holds the aggregate protocol positions and tracks per-user      settlement history via `settlementHistory` and `intentNonce`.      Phase 4 will introduce onBehalf() variants in the protocol contracts so      individual positions are attributed directly to `originAddress`.","errors":{"ReentrancyGuardReentrantCall()":[{"details":"Unauthorized reentrant call."}]},"kind":"dev","methods":{"settleIntent(address,uint8,bytes,uint32,uint64)":{"params":{"intentData":"ABI-encoded parameters; empty for no-param intents.","intentType":"INTENT TYPE constant (0x01\u20130x08).","nonce":"Must equal intentNonce[originAddress] + 1.","originAddress":"The user's Hub EVM sovereign account.","sourceParachain":"Polkadot parachain ID of the sending chain."}}},"title":"KredioXCMSettler","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{"authorisedParachains(uint32)":{"notice":"Parachain IDs allowed to call settleIntent."},"decodeAndValidate(uint8,bytes)":{"notice":"Off-chain preflight check. params.intentData: ABI-encoded parameters; empty for no-param intents.
params.originAddress: The user's Hub EVM sovereign account.
params.sourceParachain: Polkadot parachain ID of the sending chain.

authorisedParachains(uint32).notice: Parachain IDs allowed to call settleIntent.

decodeAndValidate(uint8,bytes).notice: Off-chain preflight check. Validates intent bytes are well-formed         for the given intent type without writing state.

estimateIntent(address,uint8,bytes).notice: Dry-run simulation. Checks balances, oracle, and feasibility.         Returns whether the intent would succeed and the expected output.         Does NOT write state.

getSettlementHistory(address,uint256,uin.notice: Paginated settlement history. Returns at most `limit` records         starting from `offset` index (0-based).

intentNonce(address).notice: Per-user strictly-incrementing nonce to prevent XCM intent replay.

intentPaused(uint8).notice: Per-intent-type emergency pause. Allows surgical disabling.

paused().notice: Global pause. Blocks all settleIntent calls when true.

recoverStuckPAS().notice: Recovers any native PAS accidentally left in this contract.

recoverStuckTokens(address,uint256).notice: Recovers any ERC-20 tokens accidentally left in this contract.

settleIntent(address,uint8,bytes,uint32,.notice: Entry point for XCM Transact payloads.         Called by the Hub EVM XCM executor after tokens have already         landed in `originAddress`. Does NOT revert on protocol failure —         failure is recorded on-chain so the XCM message is fully consumed.
